highlights.description: Configurable navigation web component built with Lit for unified navigation across React and MkDocs sites
MkDocs Material integration package with templates and CSS for seamless documentation subsites

added.description: `@renderforge/lit-navbar` - Configurable navigation web component with dropdown menus, mobile support, and theming
Three-segment title styling (accent, primary, muted) for brand customization
IIFE build format for cross-origin loading without CORS issues
Mega menu and mobile menu components
`@renderforge/mkdocs-integration` - Templates and CSS for MkDocs Material theme integration
MkDocs override template (`main.html`) with navbar configuration
`mkdocs-nav-offset.css` for positioning MkDocs elements below unified navbar
`mkdocs-theme-dark.css` full dark theme matching AIStandards.io design system
Setup script for automated MkDocs integration

documentation.description: Comprehensive lit-navbar README with API reference and examples
React + MkDocs unified navigation tutorial with troubleshooting guide
Build instructions and asset source documentation
